basic_details.job_title: GSFC University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: GSFC University has published the Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS position. Candidates holding a full-time M.E./ M.Tech. degree with a minimum of 55% marks or equivalent (Ph.D. preferred) are eligible to apply online through the official website. The application process will remain open until 27 July 2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF and online application link below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E. / M. Tech. (Full-time) with minimum 55% or equivalent, PhD preferable
qualification.details: Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS: M.E. / M. Tech. (Full-time) with minimum 55% (or an equivalent grade in a point scale wherever grading system is followed) or a relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. PhD is Preferable. Specialization in Fire/Fire Protection Engineering or HSE/Industrial Safety Engineering domain, preferably in the area of Fire system design, Fire Safety Audits and specialised in Fire Protection systems.

selection_process: Written Ability Test Personal Interview Demo Lecture
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSFC University Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSFC University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.gsfc_university: M.E. / M. Tech. (Full-time) with minimum 55% or equivalent, PhD preferable

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Assistant Professor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the GSFC University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download GSFC University Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Assistant Professor Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS: M.E. / M. Tech. (Full-time) with minimum 55% (or an equivalent grade in a point scale wherever grading system is followed) or a relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. PhD is Preferable. Specialization in Fire/Fire Protection Engineering or HSE/Industrial Safety Engineering domain, preferably in the area of Fire system design, Fire Safety Audits and specialised in Fire Protection systems.

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Ability Test Personal Interview Demo Lecture

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSFC University Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSFC University to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSFC University Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS position at GSFC University is 27th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is M.E. / M. Tech. (Full-time) with a minimum of 55% marks or an equivalent grade. A PhD is also preferable for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies for the Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS post announced by GSFC University in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS role includes a Written Ability Test, followed by a Personal Interview, and a Demo Lecture.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the GSFC University Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS position is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q7. Which specialization is preferred for the Assistant Professor - Fire & EHS role?
faq.answer: Candidates with specialization in Fire/Fire Protection Engineering or HSE/Industrial Safety Engineering are preferred. Specific areas of expertise include Fire system design, Fire Safety Audits, and Fire Protection systems.

faq.question: Q8. Where is GSFC University located?
faq.answer: GSFC University is located in Vadodara, Gujarat. This recruitment is an excellent opportunity for candidates residing in or willing to relocate to Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Gujarat. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to download and read the PDF thoroughly before applying.
